title: Galaxy-backed Boundary to launch 'verifiable' institutional stablecoin USBD
message_html: Galaxy-backed Boundary to launch 'verifiable' institutional stablecoin USBD ...
snippet: The project has raised $2 million in pre-seed funding led by Galaxy Ventures and plans to launch USBD on Ethereum in early summer 2026.

title: Sharplink Q1 revenue tops $12 million as it pursues 'singles and doubles' hits in ETH yield
message_html: Sharplink Q1 revenue tops $12 million as it pursues 'singles and doubles' hits in ETH yield ...
snippet: Sharplink said its new Galaxy Digital partnership will deploy roughly $125 million into onchain liquidity and DeFi opportunities.
